commands.author: Marvinthebored

target.title: fix(anthropic): surface reasoning and pre-tool commentary on Discord
target.body:
> **Current revision (head `b078781489`) вЂ” review-responded & Discord-scoped.** Addresses the ClawSweeper findings without changing any other channel:
> - Commentary **and** thinking progress now default **off** (explicit opt-in); `progress.thinking` is contract-wired into the type, zod schema, **and** the generated channel-config metadata (validates at config-load).
> - Message-tool-only reasoning-privacy invariant **restored** (trailing reasoning suppressed uniformly); opaque tool-call id keying restored.
> - The `рџ§ `/`рџ’¬` lane markers and the thinking gate are now **Discord-scoped opt-in compositor params** вЂ” Telegram, Mattermost and every other progress-mode channel render exactly as on `main`. This PR touches no other channel.
> - Verified live on Discord (`anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6`), plain (`_p_`) + verbose/reasoning (`_rv_`). See the [review-response comment](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/96106#issuecomment-4797749572) for the per-finding walkthrough.

---

## What Problem This Solves

On Discord, Anthropic models' **reasoning** (рџ§ ) and **pre-tool commentary** (рџ’¬) don't surface correctly alongside tool calls:

- In **plain mode** (reasoning off + verbose off) they were dropped entirely вЂ” the model *generates* them, but they never reached the streaming progress draft or the collapse-summary counters (the bar showed `рџ’¬ 0 В· рџ§  0` even though the content existed in the session transcript).
- They didn't **interleave** with tool calls in arrival order вЂ” a multi-step turn collapsed multiple notes/thoughts onto a single line (edit-in-place) instead of showing `рџ§  в†’ рџ’¬ в†’ рџ› пёЏ в†’ рџ’¬ в†’ рџ› пёЏ` as the turn actually unfolded.

## Why This Change Was Made

`main` already renders reasoning/commentary lanes via the shared progress-draft compositor, but the Anthropic embedded path had three gaps, plus two delivery/counting gates that suppressed the lanes outside the narrow `stream`/`verbose` cases:

1. Anthropic tool-turn narration isn't tagged as commentary, so it's never recognized/routed.
2. The embedded commentary stream (`stream:"assistant"`, `phase:"commentary"`) reaches the agent-event bus but is never rebuilt into a `preamble` item event вЂ” so `noteWindowCommentary` never counts it and the draft never renders it.
3. Window thinking was gated on `reasoningMode === "stream"`, so plain mode (reasoning *off*) dropped reasoning from the window draft and counters. Window thinking is *presentation* вЂ” it should stream for any mode except `"on"` (which uses durable рџ§  persistence instead).

This wires the Anthropic embedded path through `main`'s existing lane rendering вЂ” no new render surface.

## User Impact

Across **plain / verbose / reasoning** modes on Discord, Anthropic turns now surface their reasoning and pre-tool commentary, **interleaved with tool calls in arrival order**, and the collapse-summary bar counts all three lanes (`рџ§  N thoughts В· рџ’¬ N notes В· рџ› пёЏ N tool calls`). No config changes; no new render surface.

## Evidence

Live, on a build carrying these commits (Discord, `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6`), verified by reading the bot's actual channel messages:

**Plain mode (reasoning off + verbose off):**
- Streaming draft: `рџ§  _вЂ¦reasoningвЂ¦_ в†’ рџ’¬ _First, the time:_ в†’ рџ› пёЏ date в†’ рџ’¬ _Next, the two largest files вЂ” sorting by size:_ в†’ рџ› пёЏ list files` вЂ” reasoning + commentary **interleaved with tools in arrival order**.
- Collapse bar: `рџ§  1 thought В· рџ’¬ 3 notes В· рџ› пёЏ 4 tool calls В· вЏ±пёЏ 32s` вЂ” all three lanes counted (was `рџ’¬ 0 В· рџ§  0` before the fix).

**Verbose + reasoning mode:** commentary renders as durable messages interleaved with tools: `рџ’¬ в†’ рџ› пёЏ в†’ рџ’¬ в†’ рџ› пёЏ в†’ рџ’¬ в†’ рџ› пёЏ`. No regression.

**After-fix evidence (plain mode, reasoning off + verbose off):**

Streaming draft вЂ” reasoning + commentary interleaved with the tool in arrival order:

![plain streaming interleave](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Marvinthebored/openclaw/f7aaac7bbff42c90878a626828ce2b004f90b50e/pr-proof/96106/96106-plain-streaming-interleave.png)

Collapse summary вЂ” all three lanes counted:

![plain collapse counts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Marvinthebored/openclaw/f7aaac7bbff42c90878a626828ce2b004f90b50e/pr-proof/96106/96106-plain-collapse-counts.png)


**Persistent (verbose `_rv_`) mode (reasoning on + verbose on):** reasoning + commentary render as durable messages interleaved with tools in arrival order вЂ” the first thought surfaces as a рџ§  blockquote before the tool:

![rv persistent interleave](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Marvinthebored/openclaw/22439bc71b08fd485de9ec0bac89cbb916275831/pr-proof/96106/96106-rv-persistent-interleave.png)

Validation: `tsgo` (core + test-types) pass; lane suites green (`message-handler.process.test.ts`, `embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts`, `progress-draft-compositor.test.ts` including the `"interleaves reasoning bursts with tool calls in arrival order"` assertion); `build-all` exit 0.

## Linked context

- **Fixes #96079.**
- **Related #89473** (per-channel reasoning classification umbrella вЂ” the Discord/Anthropic sibling).
